Name: DT
WodDescription:
5 Rounds:
12 Deadlifts (155 lb)
9 Hang Power Cleans (155 lb)
6 Push Jerks (155 lb)
Notes: Same barbell for all movements. Cycle efficiently and minimize drops. In honor of U.S. Air Force Staff Sgt. Timothy P. Davis.

Name: DT
WodDescription:
5 Rounds:
12 Deadlifts (105 lb)
9 Hang Power Cleans (105 lb)
6 Push Jerks (105 lb)
Notes: Same barbell for all movements. Cycle efficiently and minimize drops. In honor of U.S. Air Force Staff Sgt. Timothy P. Davis.

Name: Murph
WodDescription:
For Time (with 20 lb vest):
1 Mile Run
100 Pull-ups
200 Push-ups
300 Squats
1 Mile Run
Notes: Partition the pull-ups, push-ups, and squats as needed. In memory of Navy Lt. Michael Murphy.

Name: Murph
WodDescription:
For Time (with 14 lb vest):
1 Mile Run
100 Pull-ups
200 Push-ups
300 Squats
1 Mile Run
Notes: Partition the pull-ups, push-ups, and squats as needed. In memory of Navy Lt. Michael Murphy.

Name: JT
WodDescription:

Name: The Chief

Name: The Chief
WodDescription:

For Time:
Run 1 Mile

Run 800 Meters
21 Clean and Jerks (155 lb)
Run 1 Mile

Name: Abbate
WodDescription:
For Time:
Run 1 Mile

Run 800 Meters
21 Clean and Jerks (105 lb)
Run 1 Mile

Name: Dallas 5
WodDescription:

Station 4: AMRAP 7 Snatches (75 lb) + 7 Push-ups
Station 5: Max Rowing (calories)
Notes: Commemorates the five officers who lost their lives in the July 7, 2016 Dallas attack.
